hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,json,subprocess; inp=json.loads(os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT','{}')); fp=inp.get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['ruff','check','--fix',fp],capture_output=True) if fp.endswith('.py') else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import os,json,subprocess; inp=json.loads(os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT','{}')); fp=inp.get('file_path','').replace('\\','/'); targets=['SCHEDULE.md','RECURRING.md','session.md','daily/']; match=any(t in fp for t in targets); repo=os.path.expanduser('~/projects/agent-orchestration'); subprocess.run(['git','-C',repo,'add',fp],capture_output=True) if match else None; subprocess.run(['git','-C',repo,'commit','-m','auto: schedule update'],capture_output=True) if match else None; r=subprocess.run(['git','-C',repo,'push'],capture_output=True) if match else None; print('[WARN] git push failed:',r.stderr.decode().strip(),flush=True) if match and r and r.returncode!=0 else None" 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import os,json,subprocess; inp=json.loads(os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT','{}')); fp=inp.get('file_path','').replace('\\','/'); targets=['SCHEDULE.md','RECURRING.md','session.md','daily/']; repo=os.path.expanduser('~/projects/agent-orchestration'); subprocess.run(['git','-C',repo,'pull','--rebase'],capture_output=True) if any(t in fp for t in targets) else None" 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'RULE VIOLATION: WebSearch is blocked. Delegate research to Gemini instead: bash ~/projects/agent-orchestration/scripts/orchestrate.sh gemini "<query>" <task-name>' >&2 && exit 2
